steps.prompt: Every animal has a name — and you can write them! Find cat and trace it!
steps.feedback: Cat! Three letters for a furry friend. Now find dog!
Dog! Another three-letter animal. Now find bird!
Bird! Four letters — wings and feathers. Now find frog!
Frog! Four letters — lives near water. Last one — find fish!
Fish! Four letters — lives in the water. You wrote five animal names!
